arts.ttl: I played for Arsenal and my last club completed transfer without telling me
arts.sum: Days later, the player reposted - adding a smiling face with a tear emoji - the following message from content creator and fellow non-league footballer Alex Teniola: "I'm done with these stupid clubs that think they can do what they want! Tottenham-born former Arsenal youth player Jason Banton claims to have learned about becoming a free agent on social media.

arts.ttl: £62m Victor Osimhen deal, Alexander Isak move - Arsenal striker transfer decision made - Lee Wilmot - football.london
arts.sum: The Gunners have been linked with plenty of different players in the past few transfer windows, with the likes of Viktor Gyokeres, Alexander Isak and Benjamin Sesko chief among them. We asked our football.london writers to name the preferred choice out of six names put to them - Sesko, Gyokeres, Isak, Jonathan David, Victor Osimhen and Dusan Vlahovic.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal have now decided they will try and sign £54m striker if Benjamin Sesko snubs them again

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Crystal Palace line ups as Rice returns, Jesus decision made
arts.sum: Canton’s Arsenal XI vs Crystal Palace: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Merino, Odegaard; Saka, Jesus, Martinelli. With Declan Rice available but a risk to play, I would lean into Thomas Partey in the defensive midfield role, with Mikel Merino and Martin Odegaard ahead of him.
